name: tongfeng
tagline: Leading Film Capacitor and Electronic Components Manufacturer
description: Tongfeng Electronics (Anhui Tongfeng Electronics Co., Ltd.) is a leading Chinese manufacturer specializing in film capacitors, metallized films, and electronic components. Founded in 1996 and listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange (Code: 600237), Tongfeng serves global markets including new energy, rail transit, power transmission, automotive electronics, and home appliances.
longDescription: Tongfeng Electronics, established in September 1996 and headquartered in Tongling, Anhui Province, China, is a publicly-listed company (Shanghai Stock Exchange: 600237) specializing in the research, development, and manufacturing of electrical films, metallized films, and film capacitors. With over 25 years of industry experience, Tongfeng has grown into one of China's largest film capacitor manufacturers, with annual production capacity exceeding 110 million AC motor capacitors and 20,000 tons of polypropylene films for capacitors. The company's products are widely used in new energy vehicles, rail transportation, power transmission and distribution, wind and solar power generation, smart grids, industrial drives, and consumer electronics. Tongfeng's commitment to quality and innovation has earned partnerships with numerous Fortune 500 companies, and its products are exported to the European Union, United States, Brazil, Australia, India, Korea, Japan, and Southeast Asian markets. As a Tongfeng capacitor distributor, we provide comprehensive selection guidance and technical support for your project requirements.

coreProducts.name: Film Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-quality metallized film capacitors including AC motor capacitors (CBB60/CBB61/CBB65), DC-link capacitors, and snubber capacitors for industrial and automotive applications.

coreProducts.name: Power Electronics Capacitors
coreProducts.description: Specialized capacitors for power electronics including DC support capacitors, filtering capacitors, and energy storage capacitors for inverters, converters, and power supplies.

coreProducts.name: Metallized Films
coreProducts.description: Polypropylene and polyester metallized films for capacitor manufacturing with high-quality aluminum metallization and self-healing properties.

coreProducts.name: Electronic Connectors
coreProducts.description: Precision electronic connectors and crystal resonators for various electronic applications including consumer electronics and industrial equipment.

industries.name: New Energy
industries.description: Solar inverters, wind power converters, and energy storage systems requiring high-reliability DC-link and filtering capacitors.

industries.name: Rail Transportation
industries.description: Traction systems, auxiliary power supplies, and onboard electronics for locomotives, trams, and metro systems.

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: EV/HEV powertrains, onboard chargers, DC-DC converters, and automotive electronics requiring AEC-Q200 qualified components.

industries.name: Industrial Drives
industries.description: Variable frequency drives, servo systems, and industrial automation equipment requiring robust DC-link capacitors.

industries.name: Consumer Electronics
industries.description: Home appliances, lighting, and electronic devices requiring reliable AC motor capacitors and electronic components.

certifications.name: UL Certification
certifications.description: UL Recognized Components for North American Market

certifications.name: VDE Certification
certifications.description: VDE Certified for European Market Access

certifications.name: CQC Certification
certifications.description: China Quality Certification for Domestic Market

seoTitle: Tongfeng Electronics - Film Capacitor Manufacturer | Authorized Distributor
seoDescription: Tongfeng Electronics is a leading Chinese manufacturer of film capacitors, metallized films, and electronic components. Authorized distributor with selection guide and technical support.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Tongfeng Electronics?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of Tongfeng Electronics products. We maintain direct partnerships with Tongfeng and can provide genuine products with full manufacturer warranty and technical support. As an authorized distributor, we have access to Tongfeng's complete product portfolio including film capacitors, metallized films, and electronic components. We provide comprehensive selection guidance, application engineering support, and competitive pricing for all Tongfeng products. Our technical team has received training from Tongfeng engineers and can assist with product selection, application design, and troubleshooting.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify our distributor status and request a quotation for your Tongfeng capacitor requirements. We can provide certificates of authorization upon request.

faqs.question: What are the core competitive advantages of Tongfeng capacitors?
faqs.answer: Tongfeng Electronics offers several key competitive advantages: First, as one of China's largest film capacitor manufacturers with over 25 years of experience, Tongfeng has developed deep expertise in metallized film technology and capacitor manufacturing. Second, their vertically integrated production from polypropylene films to finished capacitors ensures consistent quality and cost competitiveness. Third, Tongfeng's products are certified to international standards including UL, VDE, and CQC, making them suitable for global markets. Fourth, their extensive product range covers AC motor capacitors (CBB60/CBB61/CBB65), DC-link capacitors for inverters, and specialized capacitors for automotive and industrial applications. Finally, Tongfeng's large-scale manufacturing capabilities enable competitive pricing while maintaining high quality standards.
faqs.decisionGuide: For cost-sensitive applications requiring reliable film capacitors, Tongfeng offers excellent value. Contact us to discuss your specific requirements and compare with other brands.

faqs.question: How do Tongfeng capacitors compare with international brands?
faqs.answer: Tongfeng capacitors offer comparable performance to international brands at more competitive price points. In terms of technical specifications, Tongfeng's film capacitors meet or exceed industry standards for capacitance tolerance, voltage ratings, and temperature characteristics. Their CBB65 AC motor capacitors, for example, offer similar performance to European and Japanese alternatives but at significantly lower cost. For industrial applications, Tongfeng's DC-link capacitors provide excellent ripple current handling and long operational life. The main differences are in brand recognition and established supply chain relationships. For applications where cost optimization is important without compromising reliability, Tongfeng provides an excellent alternative to premium international brands. Many multinational companies already use Tongfeng capacitors in their products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider Tongfeng for new designs or cost reduction initiatives where you need reliable performance at competitive prices. We can provide samples for evaluation and testing.

faqs.question: What are the main applications of Tongfeng film capacitors?
faqs.answer: Tongfeng film capacitors serve a wide range of applications across multiple industries. In consumer electronics, their CBB60/CBB61/CBB65 capacitors are widely used in air conditioners, refrigerators, washing machines, and pumps for motor starting and running. In industrial applications, Tongfeng's DC-link capacitors are essential components in variable frequency drives (VFDs), servo systems, and UPS equipment. For new energy applications, their capacitors are used in solar inverters, wind power converters, and energy storage systems. In automotive electronics, Tongfeng provides AEC-Q200 qualified capacitors for electric vehicles (EVs) and hybrid electric vehicles (HEVs), including onboard chargers and DC-DC converters. Additionally, their power electronics capacitors are used in rail transportation systems, smart grids, and industrial power supplies.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to find Tongfeng capacitors for your specific application, or contact our FAE team for application-specific recommendations.

faqs.question: What certifications do Tongfeng products hold?
faqs.answer: Tongfeng Electronics maintains comprehensive certifications to ensure product quality and market access. Their manufacturing facilities are certified to ISO 9001 for quality management and ISO 14001 for environmental management. For automotive applications, Tongfeng holds IATF 16949 certification, demonstrating their capability to meet automotive industry quality requirements. Product-level certifications include UL recognition for North American markets, VDE certification for European markets, and CQC certification for the Chinese domestic market. These certifications ensure that Tongfeng capacitors meet international safety and performance standards. Additionally, many Tongfeng products are AEC-Q200 qualified for automotive electronics applications. When you purchase through our authorized distribution channel, you receive products with full certification documentation and traceability.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring specific certifications, contact us to confirm the certification status of particular Tongfeng products and obtain certification documentation.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of purchasing Tongfeng products through LiTong?
faqs.answer: Purchasing Tongfeng products through LiTong Electronics as an authorized distributor offers several key advantages. First, you are guaranteed to receive genuine Tongfeng products with full manufacturer warranty, eliminating the risk of counterfeit components. Second, we maintain local inventory for popular Tongfeng products, enabling shorter lead times compared to direct factory orders. Third, our technical team provides application engineering support including product selection, circuit design recommendations, and troubleshooting assistance. Fourth, we offer flexible purchasing options including small quantity orders for prototypes and volume pricing for production quantities. Fifth, we provide comprehensive documentation including datasheets, certificates of conformance, and material declarations. Finally, our quality management system ensures proper handling and storage of all components to maintain their specifications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to discuss your Tongfeng capacitor requirements and learn about our value-added services including technical support and inventory programs.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Tongfeng capacitor orders?
faqs.answer: Lead times for Tongfeng capacitors vary depending on product type and order quantity. For standard products such as CBB60, CBB61, and CBB65 AC motor capacitors that we stock locally, lead times are typically 1-2 weeks for small to medium quantities. For industrial-grade DC-link capacitors and specialized products, lead times from the factory typically range from 4-8 weeks depending on the specific product and current production schedules. For large volume orders or custom specifications, lead times may be longer and should be discussed with our sales team. We recommend maintaining safety stock for critical applications and can work with you to establish inventory programs including scheduled deliveries and consignment stock arrangements. For urgent requirements, we can often expedite orders or suggest alternative products from our stocked inventory.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team with your specific requirements and timeline to get accurate lead time information and discuss inventory management options.
